case_title: MANUEL E RAMIREZ VS. MANUEL H GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, MANUEL E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, MANUEL H DBA MG & ASSOCIATES $275.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
